competitors_identified.description: List of competitors found at this account, with evidence and confidence. Maximum 3 entries.

evidence.description: Specific, citable evidence for this competitor's presence at the account (e.g., 'Job posting on Greenhouse dated Feb 2025 requires Salesforce Admin certification')

confidence.description: Confidence level based on quality and quantity of evidence

what_they_use_it_for.description: Specific function this competitor serves at this account — not the generic product category

displacement_angle.description: The specific, account-contextualized argument for replacing this competitor. Must reference at least one evidence point from this account.

source_urls.description: URLs of sources that provided this evidence

recommended_positioning.description: Single account-specific positioning statement synthesizing the competitive landscape. 3-5 sentences. Must acknowledge competitor strengths, identify the specific gap, and connect to this account's business context.

battle_cards.description: Per-competitor battle cards tailored to this account

our_strengths.description: Product capabilities that are superior to this competitor, relevant to this account's use case

their_weaknesses.description: Known gaps or limitations of this competitor that are relevant to this account specifically

talking_points.description: 2-3 account-specific talking points. Each must connect a specific evidence point to a product capability.

landmines_to_avoid.description: Topics or claims to avoid when discussing this competitor at this specific account

no_competitor_found.description: Set to true if no competitor evidence was found at this account. Accompanied by research_notes explaining what was checked.

research_notes.description: Notes on research approach, sources checked, and any inconclusive signals worth monitoring
